title: helichrysum praecurrens
intro: Helichrysum praecurrens, also known as Coast Helichrysum or Crouching Everlasting, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It is native to South Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum praecurrens include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and promoting healing, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, eczema, and scars. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum praecurrens include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
